narrative:
Nelsonville City has 2,233 registered voters, with 66.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 9.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.0%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 14.3 percentage points.
